title: sibliths better trees
body:
One small part of the coming sibliths better minecraft datapack series, this datapack changes


azaleia trees - Now just a little bigger and badder than before

oak trees - now bigger and less square and ugly

dark oak trees - now more like giant spruce trees, but BIGGER!

birch trees - now a branching organic tree rather than blob-on-a-stick

spruce trees -made to be a little prettier and a little bigger, also ugly blob-on-a-stick trees are gone

cherry trees - made a little bigger and more organic

jungle trees - made less square amongst other tweeks, fixed blob trees being blobby, now much better :)

brown and red mushrooms - red mushrooms are now smaller and pointier, brow mushrooms are like base red mushrooms

swamp oak trees - now instead of being boring blobs they are dead skeleton trees

NOT mangrove trees

NOT any other worldgen (wont touch terrain, buildings or caves)
